notes: Regression ratchet prevents silent drops in tracked artifacts, authoritative manifests, authoritative rules, automated/mapped rules, or unsupported-rule ceilings.
Generated candidate checks are fixture-backed scaffolding, not live production asset validation.

Latest pass expands the public DISA corpus in an 11-artifact high-yield platform history batch: Ubuntu 22.04 V2R4-V2R5, Ubuntu 24.04 V1R3-V1R4, Defender Antivirus V2R4, Edge V2R2-V2R3, Windows Server 2019 V3R6, Oracle Linux 8 V2R4, and Oracle Linux 9 V1R1-V1R2. The unsupported-rule ceiling intentionally rises for the added authoritative rules pending automation.
